docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, YUXUAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'RIODAN, JOHN $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $330.00, COURT FINDS DEDUCTION OF $100 FOR CLEANING AND $420 FOR PAINTING ARE REASONABLE. COURT FINDS THAT LANDLORD SHOULD NOT BE PENALIZED FOR LATE RETURN OF SECURITY DEPSOIT BASED ON ALL CIRCUMSTANCES. TENANT IS ENTITLED TO ADDITIONAL AMOUNT OF $300. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
